metadata.description: The Media OS for Claude Code. One plugin, 96 production skills + 7 orchestrator agents + safety hooks + a PATH-level CLI toolbelt (moprobe, moqc, mosafe) + an incoming-media watcher, covering FFmpeg complete, professional companion tools, OBS Studio, GStreamer/MediaMTX, broadcast IP, control protocols, system audio routing, VFX, computer vision, WebRTC, and 2026 open-source AI media. Each skill is also a sealed folder at skills/<name>/ — users who want just one can copy the folder into their own .claude/skills/ directory.

plugins.name: media-os
plugins.description: The complete Media OS bundle — 96 skills + 7 orchestrator agents + 4 safety hooks + 3 PATH-level CLIs (moprobe, moqc, mosafe) + incoming-media watcher. Covers FFmpeg complete, professional companion tools, OBS Studio, streaming frameworks, broadcast IP, control protocols, system audio routing, VFX stack, computer vision, WebRTC, and 2026 open-source AI media. Install this if you want everything in one.
